name: python3-uritemplate
title: python3-uritemplate
description:
implementation of RFC6570 - Python 3.x
python-uritemplate implements RFC6570. URI Template can expand templates up to
and including Level 4 in that specification. It exposes one method, "expand".
.
This package provides the Python 3.x module.
use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use python3-uritemplate because implementation of RFC6570 - Python 3.x.
When the engagement is in the install phase, use python3-uritemplate as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair python3-uritemplate with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `python3-uritemplate --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
